description: Toggles the ZX plane grid (y=0) inside a g3d container. Renders grid lines and a subtle semi-transparent fill. Include to show, omit to hide.
utility: Show ZX plane grid on a g3d graph

examples.scenario: g3d with XY and ZX grids
examples.expression: G = g3d(at(5, 15), view(30, 30), range(-3, 3, 1), "rhs", xygrid(), zxgrid())
